title: Principal Instructional Designer at Lido Learning

jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at Lido Learning
jsonLd.description:
Lido Learning invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Kanpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lido Learning:
Lido Learning is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lido Learning!
